meaning: n.蟾ｴ蟆ｼ(Barnabas 逧◑亰遘ｰ)(m.),蜷ｵ髣ｹ,螟ｧ蜷ｵ螟ｧ髣ｹ
examples: For an instant, Barney was tempted to flee.
When he came to and raised his head, he saw Barney.
The young man whose name was Barney looked at her very sadly.
In a recent case five Merrill Lynch brokers defected to Smith Barney and Merrill sued.
It is not some hostile remark from Barney Frank, or left-wing critic of capitalism.
